conflicts.description: Saint Brigid intake states curfew at 20:00 with no exceptions, while later chapter-18 planning references half-eight return and 21:00 door bolt conditions.
conflicts.canonical_value: By chapter 18 operations, Noreen follows an in-by-20:30 routine with doors bolted at 21:00 under compliance review.
conflicts.resolution_note: The later value is embedded in multiple chapter-18 causal beats (travel timing, hostel compliance, nursery access), so it is treated as the active rule set after intake processing.

conflicts.description: Arthur is formally introduced/documented as Hale, but Tom repeatedly uses Pike.
conflicts.canonical_value: Legal/official surname is Hale; Pike is retained only as an in-world misnaming alias.
conflicts.resolution_note: Council paperwork and self-identification are documentary anchors and therefore higher reliability than character mockery/misnaming.

conflicts.description: Tom is reported as sleeping at his brother's, then reported not to have been there the previous day.
conflicts.canonical_value: Tom's chapter-17 location is treated as unverified; continuity records him as absent/unreachable.
conflicts.resolution_note: Both references are second-hand reports; the causally important invariant is his non-availability during labor emergency.
